title: Feedback pattern analyzer
objective: Add a minimal analyzer that groups sanitized signals into failure categories and produces generalized improvement proposals for templates, prompts, policies, or gates.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Read a directory of sanitized-signal.json files and group by failureCategory, reasonCode, profile, adapter, and generatorVersion.
Generate a failure-taxonomy summary and improvement-proposals/*.md without raw project content.
Mark proposals as candidate-only until validated by eval regression.
Add sample sanitized signals and expected analyzer output.
Document how this supports Meta Learning without violating project ownership.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: sanitized signal에서 반복 실패 패턴과 개선 후보를 추출한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
